records.ety: [NL., from Gr. zw^,on an animal + fyto`n a plant.]

defs: An extensive artificial and heterogeneous group of animals, formerly adopted by many Zoologists. It included the cœlenterates, echinoderms, sponges, Bryozoa, Protozoa, etc.
notes: ☞ Sometimes the name is restricted to the Cœlentera, or to the Anthozoa.
